text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(The vaunted Tracen Academy attracts only the most gifted of
students.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Those born with exceptional racing instincts. Those whose greatest
purpose in life is to run. Those who never stop climbing to greater
and greater heights.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And me... What can I become here?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Then, one day... one fateful day...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is shooting farther and farther ahead! Three lengths, now
four lengths in front—there's no stopping her!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Can we really call this a mere scrimmage? What a show of strength
from Maruzensky! And now, she flies across the finish!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (A flash of light darted past... and lit up my world.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few months later...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm taking a stroll early one morning, I see students doing some
light running on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Nice going. Your form was perfect! But those last 400 meters had you
lagging behind your target pace.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, maybe aiming for such a fast pace right off the bat wasn't a
good idea. I'll hold off on that until my cardio improves a bit more.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, tomorrow I'll dial down the pace and work back up little by
little!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Yes, that sounds like a plan. Now, I will say... call me biased,
but you've improved quite a lot recently.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thank you! Actually, I think you're right—it's like I've sprouted
and shot up all at once!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I keep working at it step by step, then s-someday, I... I might even
be able to go toe to toe with Maruzen... maybe?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Or not! Ahaha, forget I said anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, I think that's a wonderful dream. Oh, it's about time for breakfast.
Were you planning on...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I still have some drills to get through, so I'll head over once I'm
done! Thank you so much, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No worries. I'll go on ahead, then.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: All right, let's see what's left...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Muttering intently to herself, the young racer scribbles away in her
notebook. As I watch with curiosity, I hear footsteps approaching.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper
text_block_list.text:
That kid there caught your interest, Trainer? Her name's Sakura
Chiyono O. She was with a friend today, but usually she's at it all by
herself.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper
text_block_list.text:
You won't see her doing back-to-back hill sprints or anything like
that, but she's here running every single morning, and makes sure to
reflect on it after.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper
text_block_list.text:
Through trial and error, she gets a little faster each day, improving
slowly but surely. Well, all I'm trying to say is... you might like to think
about scouting her!
choice_data_list: Looks like she's already got a devoted fan.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You know, you might be right. I do watch her every morning.
Ah, just seeing her hard at work puts a spring in my step.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Gotta love being out on a nice day... Oh, I got one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"The morning sun is an Umamusume's best growth hormone"! Hehe,
nice one, me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ahh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A gust of wind snatches up her notebook and delivers it to my feet. I
catch a glimpse of pages packed to the margins with writing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: M-my Chiyonotes! Sorry about that! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... it's like my entire life squeezed into notebook form! That's
why I call it my Chiyonotes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Any lessons I learn, facts I find out, or sayings I come up with, I write
in here.
choice_data_list: That's an admirable habit to have.
That's an admirable habit to have.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, I'm really nothing special... so I just try to do what little I can,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've admired you ever since I started here! When I saw you run, it was
love at first sight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O grips a letter in her shaking hands, cheeks flushed bright
red. I get the feeling I shouldn't be witnessing this and quickly hide
myself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
One day... one day, I want to stand by your side! That's my dream! So
for now, I just want to get closer to you, one step at a time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm nowhere near good enough to earn that spot yet! But... but
please give me a chance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Please do a practice race with me, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe I should say more about what exactly I like about her
running. No, that might be too mu—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curiosity getting the better of me, I peek my head out only to find
that Chiyono O is talking to herself. As I'm taken aback by this, our
eyes meet.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: D-did you hear all that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, uhh... WAHHH! You saw nothing!
